slides.title: IFRS 9 ECL Platform
slides.subtitle:
Audit-Ready Expected Credit Loss on Databricks
Steven Tan, Solutions Architect

slides.title: Banks Spend 3-5x More on Manual ECL Processes
slides.body:
Quarterly ECL close takes 4-6 weeks with spreadsheet-based workflows
Auditors flag <red>hardcoded model metrics</red> and <red>missing segregation of duties</red>
No traceability from input data to signed-off ECL provision
Regulatory pressure: IFRS 9, Basel III, EBA guidelines demand forward-looking models
SAS/legacy platforms cost $500K+ annually with 12-month implementation cycles

slides.title: "Our auditors questioned every number because we couldn't prove how it was calculated."
Three Pillars of Audit-Ready ECL
slides.col1_body:
Monte Carlo simulation with Cholesky-correlated PD-LGD
8 macro scenarios
Real-time SSE streaming
slides.col2_body:
4 calibration tests (Binomial, HL, Jeffreys, Spiegelhalter)
Real LGD backtesting
23 domain validation rules
slides.col3_body:
RBAC with 4 roles
Segregation of duties
SHA-256 ECL hash at sign-off

slides.title: Complete 8-Step Workflow: Data to CFO Sign-Off
slides.body:
Create Project → configure reporting period and portfolio scope
Data Processing → SICR staging with product-specific thresholds
Data Control Gate → 15+ automated quality checks
Satellite Models → 8 model types linking macro variables to PD/LGD
Monte Carlo Execution → vectorized simulation with convergence tracking
Stress Testing → scenario comparison and sensitivity analysis
Management Overlays → documented adjustments with IFRS 9 references
CFO Sign-Off → immutable lock with cryptographic verification

slides.title: Before vs After: Audit Readiness
slides.left_body:
<red>Hardcoded LGD metrics</red> (AUC=0.72)
<red>No RBAC enforcement</red>
<red>Synthetic attribution</red> fallbacks
No model validation framework
4,807-line monolithic backend
slides.right_body:
<green>Computed-from-data</green> backtesting
<green>4-role RBAC</green> with OAuth
<green>Loan-level attribution</green> engine
Model cards + sensitivity analysis
13 focused domain modules

slides.title: End-to-End on Databricks — Zero External Dependencies
slides.body:
Frontend: React 19 + Vite + Tailwind CSS (served by FastAPI)
Backend: FastAPI with 138 REST endpoints across 16 route modules
Database: Lakebase (managed PostgreSQL) with OAuth token refresh
Pipeline: PySpark + Delta Lake for batch ECL calculation
Governance: Unity Catalog for data lineage and permissions
Deployment: Databricks Apps with one-command deploy (./deploy.sh)

slides.title: 233 Tests Pass — 150 New Tests Added in v2.0
slides.body:
45 backtesting tests: AUC/Gini/KS, Binomial, Hosmer-Lemeshow, Jeffreys
25 RBAC tests: role permissions, auth middleware, ECL hash verification
17 attribution tests: waterfall construction, reconciliation checks
22 model registry tests: lifecycle, model cards, sensitivity analysis
41 validation rules tests: all 23 domain rules across 3 categories
Zero new failures introduced during 7-sprint improvement cycle

slides.title: Get Started in 5 Minutes
slides.body:
Clone the repository and run ./install.sh
Edit .env.example with your Databricks workspace credentials
Run cd app && python app.py to start on port 8000
Use the Setup Wizard to connect to your Lakebase instance
Run the data pipeline scripts to generate sample portfolio data
Deploy to Databricks Apps with ./deploy.sh
